elements.title: Laura Sedgwick Collins
elements.contents: ... that composer Laura Sedgwick Collins (pictured) was the first American woman to study with Antonín Dvořák?

elements.title: Capri Bird Observatory
elements.contents: ... that the Capri Bird Observatory is housed on an island, among the ruins of a medieval castle?

elements.title: the upcoming series of The Celebrity Traitors
elements.contents: ... that the upcoming series of The Celebrity Traitors has been described as having "one of the most high-profile casts ever assembled for a reality TV show"?

elements.title: Jorge Salvaire
elements.contents: ... that Jorge Salvaire helped to build the Basilica of Our Lady of Luján on a promise to the patron saint after being spared execution?

elements.title: Motherless.com
elements.contents: ... that an investigation into Motherless.com prompted both true and false claims about pro-rape content?

elements.title: Typhoon Studios
elements.contents: ... that the closure of Typhoon Studios left its game on Google's platform with a game-breaking bug?

elements.title: Barbara Viera
elements.contents: ... that Barbara Viera's teams qualified for post-season play in each of her 27 years of coaching university volleyball?

elements.title: Sara Ryder
elements.contents: ... that a gameplay trailer featuring Mass Effect: Andromeda's Sara Ryder drew such criticism that its developer issued a public apology before the game even launched?

elements.title: co-creator of Tickle Me Elmo
elements.contents: ... that the co-creator of Tickle Me Elmo charged for rides on a toy rocket ship that he constructed from an old washing machine?
